name: Wood Wall Cabinet White - Threshold™: MDF Floating Shelf, Over Toilet Storage, 2 Shelves
description: Get the best use out of your bathroom wall space with this Wood Wall Cabinet from Threshold™. This compact wall cabinet brings space-saving storage into your bathroom decor. Made from a sturdy wood frame, it ensures a durable finish for long-term-use. This practical piece features an inset cabinet with double doors to keep toiletries and other bathroom necessities neatly tucked away, and an open shelf to display decorative accents or often-used bath items. Mount this cabinet on your empty wall space to create convenient storage.
